summary: Phase 4 lockfile/provenance plan complete: 3 tasks covering readLockfile, writeLockfile, addProvenance, removeProvenance with full TDD coverage.
pending: Task 1: Write lockfile tests (red phase) -- 17 test cases across 4 describe blocks
Task 2: Implement lockfile functions (green phase) -- readLockfile, writeLockfile, addProvenance, removeProvenance
Task 3: Export lockfile functions from sharing barrel
concerns: readLockfile must distinguish ENOENT (ok, null) from other fs errors (error result)
All pure functions (addProvenance, removeProvenance) must be immutable -- do not mutate input lockfile
decisions: writeLockfile delegates to existing writeConfig for atomic writes -- no duplication
readLockfile uses Result<Lockfile | null, string> where null means file-not-found (not an error)
addProvenance replaces on conflict (upgrade semantics) rather than erroring
removeProvenance returns Contributions | null to let callers decide what to do when package not found
